title: [e2e] tail two lines: race: need to wait for container
body:
Another one of our usual crop of "run a container with -d, then happily race away without waiting for the container" bugs. https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/89d186bdcf775fefca2c1554e7987eb02a4cc921/test/e2e/logs_test.go#L79-L87

Trivial fix (add "podman wait") but am filing as issue because I can't get to it right this minute and especially because whoever fixes this must be sure to take a look at surrounding code, looking for the same bug in other tests.

* fedora-37 : int podman fedora-37 root host boltdb
  * PR #17831
    * [04-05 11:09](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5363161415548928/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--tail-two-lines--k8s-file--1) in Podman logs [It] tail two lines: k8s-file
* fedora-37 : int remote fedora-37 root host [remote]
  * PR #17130
    * [01-16-2023 11:22](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6185369939476480/html/int-remote-fedora-37-root-host.log.html#t--tail-two-lines--json-file--1) in Podman logs [It] tail two lines: json-file 
* fedora-37 : int remote fedora-37 root host sqlite [remote]
  * PR #17831
    * [03-27 16:12](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5897153390837760/html/int-remote-fedora-37-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--tail-two-lines--json-file--1) in Podman logs [It] tail two lines: json-file

comments.body: Fixed in #18074, and I tried to fix other similar missing-wait instances. I almost certainly missed some, but we'll deal with those as they occur.
